project.title: GLS1 interactome in liver cells by IP followed by LC-MS/MS
project.projectDescription: Glutaminase (GLS1) is involved in the development of Alcoholic liver disease (ALD). Protein-protein interactions underlie the biological processes impacted by GLS1. we used immunoprecipitation-mass spectrometry (IP-MS) technology and found the proteins interacted with GLS1.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: 1. Cut the sample adhesive strip to about 0.5mm-1mm, transfer the cut adhesive strip to a 1.5m LEP tube and mark it properly; 2. decolorization: Add 1mL of decolorization solution (25mM ammonium bicarbonate, 50% acetonitrile) to decolorize at 37 ℃; 3. Reduction: Add 50mM dithiothreitol (DTT) and reduce at 56 ℃ for 1 hour; 4. Alkylation: Add 100mM iodoacetamide (IAM) and avoid light at room temperature for 40 minutes; 5. Enzymatic digestion: add trypsin, 37 ℃, enzymatic hydrolysis overnight; 6. Extract the hydrolyzed peptides and vacuum dry them.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Data collection software: Thermo Xcalibur 4.0 (Thermo, USA) Reverse column information: C18 column (75 μ M x 25cm, Thermo, USA) Chromatographic instrument: EASY-nLC 1200 Mass spectrometer: Q-Exactive HF-X (Thermo, USA) database The main methods for establishing are as follows: NCBInr classification library, including animal library, plant library, microbial library, bacterial library, etc; SwissProt/UniProt classification library, including animal library, plant library, microbial library, bacterial library, etc; When selecting a database, follow the following principles: if it is a sequenced organism, choose the species database directly; if it is a non sequenced organism, choose the major proteome database that is most relevant to the tested sample.

references.referenceLine: Wu W, Jiang H, Liu Y, Peng C, Wang H, Yang W, Lyu Z, Sun Y, Ma H, Gu H, Kan W, Jing L, Dong T, Xia C, Lei S, Wu R, Li J, Li J. GLS1-RNA Polymerase II Axis Mediates Glutamine-Dependent Hepatoprotective Effects on Alcoholic Liver Disease in High-Protein Diets. Adv Sci (Weinh). 2025 12(45):e02738

identifiedPTMStrings.name: No PTMs are included in the dataset

Characteristics[GeneticModification]: KGA sequence with the 3 × Flag tag plasmids
Characteristics[MaterialType]: Cells with overexpression FLAG‐Flag lysed by cell lysis IP buffer (P0013; Beyotime Biotechnology)
Comment[EnrichmentMethod]: Flag‐tag (8146; Cell Signaling Technology) antibody and protein A+G Agarose beads (P2055; Beyotime Biotechnology)
Comment[SpecilizedMS]: Beads containing immune complexes were washed and precipitated protein samples were submitted to further MS analysis supported by Majorbio (China).
The mass spectrometry proteomics data have been deposited to the ProteomeXchange Consortium via the PRIDE partner repository with the dataset identifier PXD050603.

The mass spectrometry proteomics data have been deposited to the ProteomeXchange Consortium via the PRIDE partner repository with the dataset identifier PXD050603.
